NotFound.title: Lost in the dark.
NotFound.description: The page you are looking for does not exist or has been moved.

HomePage.title: Chat frontend is ready for i18n
HomePage.description: next-intl has been configured with English and Vietnamese.

AuthLayout.title: Connect with your team instantly.
AuthLayout.description: Secure, fast, and reliable messaging for the modern workplace. Join thousands of users relying on ChatApp.

AuthSignup.title: Create your account
AuthSignup.description: Start chatting with your team in a few seconds.

errors.usernameMin: Username must have at least 3 characters.
errors.usernameMax: Username must have at most 16 characters.
errors.firstNameMin: First name must have at least 2 characters.
errors.firstNameMax: First name must have at most 32 characters.
errors.lastNameMin: Last name must have at least 2 characters.
errors.lastNameMax: Last name must have at most 32 characters.
errors.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address.
errors.passwordMin: Password must have at least 6 characters.
errors.passwordMax: Password must have at most 128 characters.
errors.passwordComplexity: Password must contain at least one uppercase letter, one lowercase letter, one number, and one special character.
errors.confirmPasswordMin: Confirm password must have at least 6 characters.
errors.confirmPasswordMax: Confirm password must have at most 128 characters.

AuthLogin.title: Welcome back
AuthLogin.description: Log in to your account to continue chatting.

errors.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address.

feedback.unverified: Your account is not verified. Redirecting to verification page...
feedback.invalidCredentials: Invalid email or password. Please try again.

AuthVerify.title: Email Verification
AuthVerify.description: We've sent a 6-digit verification code to {email}.

AuthForgotPassword.title: Forgot Password
AuthForgotPassword.description: Enter your email address and we'll send you a 6-digit code to reset your password.

feedback.success: Reset code sent! Redirecting to reset page...
feedback.error: Could not send reset code. Please try again.

AuthResetPassword.title: Reset Password
AuthResetPassword.description: Enter the 6-digit code sent to {email} and your new password.

errors.passwordMin: Password must be at least 8 characters.
errors.passwordMax: Password must be at most 128 characters.
errors.passwordComplexity: Password must contain at least 1 uppercase, 1 lowercase, 1 number, and 1 special character.
errors.confirmPasswordMin: Confirm password must be at least 8 characters.
errors.confirmPasswordMax: Confirm password must be at most 128 characters.

feedback.success: Password reset successfully! Redirecting to login...
feedback.error: Invalid code or failed to reset password.

Common.unexpectedError: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.
